model_patch.hadss_dialog/Index.ets:
--- a/hadss_dialog/Index.ets
+++ b/hadss_dialog/Index.ets
@@ -12,6 +12,36 @@
  * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
  * limitations under the License.
  */
-export * from './src/main/ets/common/common';
+export {
+  DialogAction,
+  DialogBackPressResult,
+  DialogType,
+  DialogStatus,
+  DialogAnimation,
+  AnimationType,
+  DialogStyle,
+  PopupStyle,
+  SheetStyle,
+  DialogDismissReason,
+  DialogConfig,
+  DialogBehavior,
+  DialogLayerPolicy,
+  DialogPosition,
+  DialogMode,
+  TopDialogPriority,
+  PopupConfig,
+  PopupPostion,
+  CustomKeyboardAvoidMode,
+  SheetBehavior,
+  ButtonItemParams,
+  SheetItem,
+  IconHorizontalToastContent,
+  IconVerticalToastContent,
+  IconPosition,
+  PopupItem
+} from './src/main/ets/common/common';
 
-export * from './src/main/ets/model/model';
+export {
+  DialogHub, GlobalEvent, InfDialog, InfCustomDialog, InfPopup, InfSheet, InfToast,
+  DialogLifeCycle, SheetLifeCycle, PresetCustom, PresetPopup, PresetSheet, PresetToast
+} from './src/main/ets/model/model';

model_patch.libgif/index.ets:
--- a/libgif/index.ets
+++ b/libgif/index.ets
@@ -12,16 +12,16 @@
 
 
 // GIF自定义组件
 export { default as GIFComponent } from './src/main/ets/components/gif/display/GIFComponent'
 // GIF解码数据规范
-export * from './src/main/ets/components/gif/display/GIFFrame'
+export { GIFFrame } from './src/main/ets/components/gif/display/GIFFrame'
 // GIF解码能力
-export * from './src/main/ets/components/gif/parse/GIFParse'
+export { parseBufferToFrame } from './src/main/ets/components/gif/parse/GIFParse'
 // GIF解码部分能力增强
-export * from './src/main/ets/components/gif/utils/ParseHelperUtils'
+export { prePatchGIF, generatePatch, fixLoseGCE } from './src/main/ets/components/gif/utils/ParseHelperUtils'
 // 本地资源网络资源获取能力
-export * from './src/main/ets/components/gif/utils/ResourceLoader'
+export { ResourceLoader, Model } from './src/main/ets/components/gif/utils/ResourceLoader'
 // 能力增强worker 解析GIF数据
 export { handler } from './src/main/ets/components/gif/worker/GifWorker'
 
-export * from 'gifuct-js'
+export { decompressFrames, ParsedFrameWithoutPatch, parseGIF } from 'gifuct-js'
